### Feature
_A clear and concise description of the new feature that you would like to see. Include screenshots, sketches or any other content that helps to explain your request._

### Rationale 
_A clear and concise description of why you want this feature. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]_

### Alternatives
_A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions you have thought of, and/or any workarounds or hacks that you are currently using._

### Additional context
_Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here._
